channel.title: HoldLens — What to sell (Q4 2025)
channel.description: Top sell signals from the best portfolio managers in the world — ranked on a single signed −100..+100 ConvictionScore where −100 is the strongest possible sell. Updated every 13F filing deadline.

item.title: AAPL SELL signal · score −11 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Warren Buffett, David Rolfe are selling AAPL (Apple Inc.) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −11 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Warren Buffett (Q5.9), David Rolfe (Q4.8).

item.title: TSLA SELL signal · score −9 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Tom Slater is selling TSLA (Tesla) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −9 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Tom Slater (Q4.8).

item.title: SIRI SELL signal · score −4 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: SIRI (SIRI) carries a strong historical sell signal even without fresh activity this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −4 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Score reflects historical dissent, crowding, and trend deterioration.

item.title: FIS SELL signal · score −3 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: FIS (Fidelity National Info) carries a strong historical sell signal even without fresh activity this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −3 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Score reflects historical dissent, crowding, and trend deterioration.

item.title: SHEL SELL signal · score −2 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Michael Burry is selling SHEL (Shell) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −2 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Quality-weighted seller list: Michael Burry (Q4.6).

item.title: STLA SELL signal · score −2 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: STLA (Stellantis) carries a strong historical sell signal even without fresh activity this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: −2 (negative = sell, positive = buy). Score reflects historical dissent, crowding, and trend deterioration.
